name: Price Sentiment Score
short_description: Calculates a sentiment score by multiplying a crypto asset's price change by a sentiment multiplier.

inputs.name: price_change
inputs.description: The change in price of the crypto asset.

name: Volume Sentiment Score Determination
short_description: Calculates a sentiment score for a crypto asset based on its trading volume increase and a given sensitivity factor.

inputs.name: sensitivity
inputs.description: Sensitivity factor used to weight the volume increase.

name: Tweet Influence on Sentiment Score
short_description: Calculates an overall tweet-based sentiment score for a crypto asset, considering the number of influential tweets, their average polarity, and an engagement factor.

inputs.name: tweet_count
inputs.description: The number of influential tweets received in a day.

inputs.name: tweet_polarity
inputs.description: The average polarity score contributed by each tweet.

inputs.name: engagement_factor
inputs.description: The overall impact adjustment factor for tweet engagement.

name: News Impact on Sentiment Score
short_description: Measures the news-based sentiment score considering the number of articles, their average sentiment, and an influence factor.

inputs.name: news_count
inputs.description: Number of news articles in a period.

inputs.name: news_score
inputs.description: Average sentiment multiplier per news article.

inputs.name: influence_factor
inputs.description: Overall influence factor weighting the news impact.

name: Multi-Factor Crypto Sentiment Analysis
short_description: Calculates an overall sentiment score for a crypto asset by combining tweet-based, news-based, and price-based factors.

inputs.name: tweet_count
inputs.description: Number of tweets related to the crypto asset

inputs.name: tweet_polarity
inputs.description: Average sentiment polarity of tweets (e.g., 1.0 for neutral, >1.0 for positive, <1.0 for negative)

inputs.name: tweet_engagement
inputs.description: Engagement factor derived from tweet interactions (e.g., retweets, likes)

inputs.name: news_count
inputs.description: Number of news articles related to the crypto asset

inputs.name: news_score
inputs.description: Average sentiment score of news articles

inputs.name: price_change
inputs.description: Recent price change of the crypto asset in USD

inputs.name: price_factor
inputs.description: Adjustment factor for the price change component
